member.name: T:AbilityKit.Network.Runtime.Conditioning.NetworkConditioningMiddleware
member.summary:
A reproducible network environment simulator that plugs into the middleware chain. It applies a (latency, jitter, loss, reorder) to both inbound and outbound packets so any sync model can be exercised under controlled, repeatable adverse conditions.
Delivery is time-driven and deterministic: a packet that is not dropped is buffered with a scheduled delivery time, and is released to the next stage only when is called with a clock value at or past that time. Supplying a fixed and an injectable clock makes "sync model x network profile" comparisons fully replayable in tests without real waiting.

member.name: M:AbilityKit.Network.Runtime.Conditioning.NetworkConditioningMiddleware.#ctor(AbilityKit.Network.Runtime.Conditioning.NetworkConditionProfile,System.Func{System.Int64},System.Int32)
member.summary: Creates a conditioning middleware.
member.param: Monotonic clock returning the current time in milliseconds. Injectable so tests can drive a virtual clock. When null, a real wall clock is used.
Seed for the deterministic random source backing jitter, loss and reorder.

member.name: M:AbilityKit.Network.Runtime.Conditioning.NetworkConditioningMiddleware.Advance(System.Int64)
member.summary: Releases every buffered packet whose scheduled delivery time is at or before , in delivery-time order. Call this from the host loop (or a test) with the current clock value to flush due packets.

member.name: T:AbilityKit.Network.Runtime.Conditioning.NetworkConditioningStats
member.summary: Running counters for a , useful for demo overlays and assertions in tests.

member.name: P:AbilityKit.Network.Runtime.Conditioning.NetworkConditioningStats.PendingCount
member.summary: Packets currently buffered awaiting their scheduled delivery time.

member.name: T:AbilityKit.Network.Runtime.Conditioning.NetworkConditionProfile
member.summary: A reproducible description of a simulated network environment. Gameplay-agnostic: any sample (Shooter, Moba) can run any sync model under any profile. Latency is expressed one-way in milliseconds; combine inbound and outbound to model RTT.

member.name: P:AbilityKit.Network.Runtime.Conditioning.NetworkConditionProfile.BaseLatencyMs
member.summary: One-way base latency in milliseconds applied to every packet.

member.name: P:AbilityKit.Network.Runtime.Conditioning.NetworkConditionProfile.JitterMs
member.summary: Maximum +/- jitter in milliseconds added on top of .

member.name: P:AbilityKit.Network.Runtime.Conditioning.NetworkConditionProfile.PacketLossRate
member.summary: Probability in [0,1] that a packet is dropped instead of delivered.

member.name: P:AbilityKit.Network.Runtime.Conditioning.NetworkConditionProfile.ReorderRate
member.summary: Probability in [0,1] that a packet is pulled earlier than its scheduled time, causing it to be delivered out of order relative to its neighbours.

member.name: P:AbilityKit.Network.Runtime.Conditioning.NetworkConditionProfile.BandwidthKbps
member.summary: Bandwidth cap in kilobits per second. 0 means unlimited.

member.name: P:AbilityKit.Network.Runtime.Conditioning.NetworkConditionProfile.Ideal
member.summary: Ideal link: zero latency, no loss. Useful as the baseline in comparisons.

member.name: P:AbilityKit.Network.Runtime.Conditioning.NetworkConditionProfile.Lan
member.summary: Local area network: a few milliseconds, no loss.

member.name: P:AbilityKit.Network.Runtime.Conditioning.NetworkConditionProfile.Mobile4G
member.summary: Typical 4G mobile link: moderate latency with noticeable jitter.

member.name: P:AbilityKit.Network.Runtime.Conditioning.NetworkConditionProfile.CrossRegion
member.summary: Cross-region link: high base latency, mild jitter.

member.name: P:AbilityKit.Network.Runtime.Conditioning.NetworkConditionProfile.PoorWifi
member.summary: Poor wifi: high jitter and meaningful loss, the stress case for sync models.

member.name: P:AbilityKit.Network.Runtime.Conditioning.NetworkConditionProfile.LimitedBandwidth
member.summary: Low-bandwidth link (128 Kbps) with otherwise ideal conditions. Exercises bandwidth budget — useful for verifying that sync models remain correct when the transport throttles throughput.

member.name: T:AbilityKit.Network.Runtime.DemoHarness.ISyncDemoCarrier
member.summary: 同步 DemoHarness 用来驱动单个示例 carrier 的玩法无关适配器。 Shooter、Moba 或未来示例都可以实现它，而不需要把具体玩法类型泄漏到框架层。

member.name: T:AbilityKit.Network.Runtime.DemoHarness.DemoHarnessCarrierSelector
member.summary: DemoHarness 集成可复用的 carrier 能力选择器。

member.name: T:AbilityKit.Network.Runtime.DemoHarness.DemoHarnessScenario
member.summary: 描述一次 A x B x C 演示运行：同步模型、网络档案与 carrier。

member.name: P:AbilityKit.Network.Runtime.DemoHarness.DemoHarnessStepTelemetry.HealthEvents
member.summary: Gameplay-agnostic health signals emitted during this step (snapshot flow, interpolation, recovery, input, validation). Empty when the carrier only reports reconciliation data.

member.name: P:AbilityKit.Network.Runtime.DemoHarness.DemoHarnessMetrics.HealthEventCount
member.summary: Total number of s observed across all steps.

member.name: P:AbilityKit.Network.Runtime.DemoHarness.DemoHarnessMetrics.HealthWarningCount
member.summary: Number of observed health events with severity.

member.name: P:AbilityKit.Network.Runtime.DemoHarness.DemoHarnessMetrics.HealthErrorCount
member.summary: Number of observed health events with severity.

member.name: M:AbilityKit.Network.Runtime.DemoHarness.DemoHarnessRunner.#ctor(System.Func{AbilityKit.Network.Runtime.DemoHarness.DemoHarnessScenario,AbilityKit.Network.Runtime.Sync.SyncClock})
member.summary: Creates a runner with a custom clock factory. Hosts inject a factory backed by a so produced anchors carry an estimated server clock; the default factory builds a bare local-frame clock with no server-time stamping.

member.name: T:AbilityKit.Network.Runtime.INetworkSyncController
member.summary: Common contract for a client side synchronization controller. A controller owns the runtime behaviour for one , such as prediction and rollback, authoritative interpolation or batched state sync. This abstraction is intentionally gameplay-agnostic so every sample can describe its active synchronization strategy through a single shared seam.

member.name: P:AbilityKit.Network.Runtime.INetworkSyncController.SyncModel
member.summary: The synchronization strategy this controller implements.

member.name: P:AbilityKit.Network.Runtime.INetworkSyncController.IsStarted
member.summary: Whether the controller has an active synchronized session running.

member.name: P:AbilityKit.Network.Runtime.INetworkSyncController.CurrentFrame
member.summary: The current frame the controller has advanced its local simulation or playback to.

member.name: T:AbilityKit.Network.Runtime.InterpolationConfig
member.summary: Gameplay-agnostic tuning for authoritative remote playback driven by + . maps the authoritative server-tick timeline to wall-clock seconds, and is how far behind the newest authoritative sample the remote playback is held so jitter is absorbed and interpolation has two samples to blend. bounds how many remote snapshots are retained.

member.name: F:AbilityKit.Network.Runtime.InterpolationConfig.DefaultCatchUpRate
member.summary: Default soft catch-up rate: absorb clock drift at up to 10% of real time per frame.

member.name: F:AbilityKit.Network.Runtime.InterpolationConfig.DefaultMaxExtrapolationTicks
member.summary: Default extrapolation tolerance: when the delayed playback time runs more than 50ms past the newest buffered snapshot (a starved buffer), playback holds the last authoritative pose and is flagged as starved rather than drifting further.

member.name: P:AbilityKit.Network.Runtime.InterpolationConfig.CatchUpRate
member.summary: How aggressively the playback clock converges toward the authoritative server time. Zero snaps directly; a positive value (clamped to 1) smoothly absorbs drift. See .

member.name: P:AbilityKit.Network.Runtime.InterpolationConfig.MaxExtrapolationTicks
member.summary: How far past the newest buffered snapshot the delayed playback may run before it is treated as starved. Within this tolerance playback holds on the newest authoritative pose; beyond it the controller flags the buffer as starved (see ).

member.name: P:AbilityKit.Network.Runtime.InterpolationConfig.Default
member.summary: Default tuning: a 100ms interpolation delay against a millisecond timeline, retaining the last 32 remote snapshots, with soft clock convergence and a 50ms extrapolation tolerance. Samples that carry server ticks in other units can supply a matching .

member.name: T:AbilityKit.Network.Runtime.InterpolationDiagnostics
member.summary: A point-in-time snapshot of authoritative remote interpolation playback health, surfaced for diagnostics / smoke output / connection-quality hints. This is intentionally kept off the mode-agnostic surface: only controllers that actually interpolate implement .

member.name: P:AbilityKit.Network.Runtime.InterpolationDiagnostics.BufferedRemoteSnapshotCount
member.summary: Number of remote authoritative snapshots currently buffered for interpolation.

member.name: P:AbilityKit.Network.Runtime.InterpolationDiagnostics.RemotePlaybackTicks
member.summary: The current delayed remote playback time, in timeline ticks.

member.name: P:AbilityKit.Network.Runtime.InterpolationDiagnostics.EstimatedServerTicks
member.summary: The current local estimate of authoritative server time, in timeline ticks.

member.name: P:AbilityKit.Network.Runtime.InterpolationDiagnostics.HasPublishedRemoteFrame
member.summary: Whether at least one remote interpolation frame has been published to presentation.

member.name: P:AbilityKit.Network.Runtime.InterpolationDiagnostics.IsRemotePlaybackStarved
member.summary: Whether the delayed playback time is running past the newest buffered snapshot by more than the configured extrapolation tolerance (the remote buffer is starved and playback is holding the last authoritative pose rather than extrapolating further).

member.name: P:AbilityKit.Network.Runtime.InterpolationDiagnostics.PlaybackDelayTicks
member.summary: How far the playback clock trails the estimated server time, in timeline ticks.

member.name: T:AbilityKit.Network.Runtime.IInterpolationDiagnosticsProvider
member.summary: Implemented by sync controllers that run authoritative remote interpolation and can therefore report . Controllers for non-interpolating sync models do not implement this, so consumers should probe with a type check / TryGet pattern.

member.name: T:AbilityKit.Network.Runtime.InterpolationMath
member.summary: Gameplay-agnostic interpolation primitives shared by style projectors. Keeps the math for blending remote snapshot fields (scalars and angles) in one place so individual game layers do not reimplement subtly wrong versions (most notably angle interpolation across the wrap point).

member.name: F:AbilityKit.Network.Runtime.InterpolationMath.TwoPiRadians
member.summary: A full turn in radians (2π).

member.name: F:AbilityKit.Network.Runtime.InterpolationMath.FullTurnDegrees
member.summary: A full turn in degrees.

member.name: M:AbilityKit.Network.Runtime.InterpolationMath.Lerp(System.Single,System.Single,System.Single)
member.summary: Linearly interpolates a scalar between and .

member.name: M:AbilityKit.Network.Runtime.InterpolationMath.LerpAngle(System.Single,System.Single,System.Single,System.Single)
member.summary: Interpolates an angle along the shortest arc, taking the wrap-around at the period boundary into account so values straddling the seam (e.g. 350° → 10°) rotate the short way instead of spinning almost all the way around. The result is returned within [0, period).
member.param: Start angle in the same unit as .
End angle in the same unit as .
The full-turn period ( for radians, for degrees).

member.name: M:AbilityKit.Network.Runtime.InterpolationMath.LerpAngleRadians(System.Single,System.Single,System.Single)
member.summary: Interpolates an angle expressed in radians along the shortest arc.

member.name: M:AbilityKit.Network.Runtime.InterpolationMath.LerpAngleDegrees(System.Single,System.Single,System.Single)
member.summary: Interpolates an angle expressed in degrees along the shortest arc.

member.name: M:AbilityKit.Network.Runtime.InterpolationMath.Repeat(System.Single,System.Single)
member.summary: Wraps into the range [0, period), mirroring the behaviour of Unity's Mathf.Repeat without taking a UnityEngine dependency.

member.name: T:AbilityKit.Network.Runtime.InterpolationTimeline
member.summary:
Gameplay-agnostic interpolation timeline for style playback. It advances a local estimate of server time from frame delta time, folds in authoritative server ticks observed on incoming snapshots, and exposes the delayed playback time used to sample a .
The timeline intentionally keeps remote playback a fixed behind the newest authoritative sample so that, under normal jitter, the target time falls between two buffered snapshots and remote entities move smoothly instead of snapping.
Two correction behaviours are supported. With the default ( == 0) the local estimate snaps directly to the authoritative target, which is simple and fully deterministic. With a positive catch-up rate the estimate instead converges toward the authoritative target over several frames at a bounded rate, so clock drift between the local frame clock and the server tick stream is absorbed smoothly rather than via a visible jump.

member.name: M:AbilityKit.Network.Runtime.InterpolationTimeline.#ctor(System.Int64,System.Int64,System.Double)
member.param: Timeline resolution: how many ticks represent one second.
How far behind the newest authoritative time playback is held.

The maximum extra fraction of a frame's advance that may be spent closing the gap between the estimate and the authoritative target each frame. 0 snaps the estimate to the target; e.g. 0.1 lets the estimate catch up at up to 10% faster (or slower) than real time so drift is absorbed smoothly. Values are clamped to [0, 1].

member.name: P:AbilityKit.Network.Runtime.InterpolationTimeline.TicksPerSecond
member.summary: Timeline resolution: how many ticks represent one second of server time.

member.name: P:AbilityKit.Network.Runtime.InterpolationTimeline.InterpolationDelayTicks
member.summary: How far behind the newest authoritative time playback is held, in ticks.

member.name: P:AbilityKit.Network.Runtime.InterpolationTimeline.MaxCatchUpRate
member.summary: The bounded soft catch-up rate. Zero means the estimate snaps to the authoritative target; a positive value means the estimate converges smoothly toward it.

member.name: P:AbilityKit.Network.Runtime.InterpolationTimeline.HasServerTime
member.summary: Whether the timeline has observed at least one authoritative server time.

member.name: P:AbilityKit.Network.Runtime.InterpolationTimeline.EstimatedServerTicks
member.summary: The current local estimate of server time, in ticks.

member.name: P:AbilityKit.Network.Runtime.InterpolationTimeline.TargetServerTicks
member.summary: The authoritative target server time the estimate is converging toward, in ticks. In snap mode this equals .

member.name: P:AbilityKit.Network.Runtime.InterpolationTimeline.PlaybackTicks
member.summary: The delayed playback time used to sample the remote snapshot buffer. This is the estimated server time minus the interpolation delay, never negative.

member.name: M:AbilityKit.Network.Runtime.InterpolationTimeline.ObserveServerTicks(System.Int64)
member.summary: Folds an authoritative server time (from a received snapshot) into the timeline. The first observation seeds both the target and the estimate. Later observations move the target forward only (stale times are ignored). In snap mode the estimate is pulled forward with the target; in soft catch-up mode the estimate is left to converge during .

member.name: M:AbilityKit.Network.Runtime.InterpolationTimeline.Advance(System.Single)
member.summary: Advances the local server time estimate by a frame delta. No-op until the first authoritative server time has been observed. The authoritative target advances at real time; in soft catch-up mode the estimate advances at real time plus a bounded correction toward the target so accumulated drift is absorbed gradually.

member.name: T:AbilityKit.Network.Runtime.RemoteInterpolationPlayback`1
member.typeparam: The buffered remote snapshot sample type.

member.name: P:AbilityKit.Network.Runtime.RemoteInterpolationPlayback`1.BufferedSampleCount
member.summary: Number of remote authoritative snapshots currently buffered for interpolation.

member.name: P:AbilityKit.Network.Runtime.RemoteInterpolationPlayback`1.PlaybackTicks
member.summary: The current delayed remote playback time, in timeline ticks.

member.name: P:AbilityKit.Network.Runtime.RemoteInterpolationPlayback`1.EstimatedServerTicks
member.summary: The current local estimate of authoritative server time, in timeline ticks.

member.name: P:AbilityKit.Network.Runtime.RemoteInterpolationPlayback`1.HasPublished
member.summary: Whether at least one remote interpolation sample has been produced via .

member.name: P:AbilityKit.Network.Runtime.RemoteInterpolationPlayback`1.IsStarved
member.summary: Whether the most recent found the delayed playback time running past the newest buffered snapshot by more than . Indicates the buffer is starved (e.g. snapshots stopped arriving) and playback is holding the last authoritative pose rather than extrapolating further.

member.name: M:AbilityKit.Network.Runtime.RemoteInterpolationPlayback`1.Observe(`0)
member.summary: Buffers a decoded remote authoritative sample and folds its server time into the timeline. Stale/duplicate samples (timeline value not strictly ahead of the newest buffered sample) are rejected and do not advance the timeline.
member.returns: true when the sample was accepted, false when it was stale/duplicate.

member.name: M:AbilityKit.Network.Runtime.RemoteInterpolationPlayback`1.Advance(System.Single)
member.summary: Advances the delayed playback timeline by a frame delta.

member.name: M:AbilityKit.Network.Runtime.RemoteInterpolationPlayback`1.TrySample(AbilityKit.Network.Runtime.RemoteSnapshotInterpolation{`0}@)
member.summary:
Samples the buffer at the current delayed playback time. Returns false until at least one authoritative time has been observed and the buffer is non-empty. On success it updates (per the extrapolation policy) and marks .
Extrapolation policy: when the delayed playback time runs past the newest buffered snapshot the buffer is starved. Remote poses are deliberately not extrapolated forward (that would invent unauthoritative motion); the returned interpolation holds the newest sample. Once the gap exceeds the configured tolerance the playback is additionally flagged as starved so callers can react (e.g. surface a connection-quality hint).

member.name: M:AbilityKit.Network.Runtime.RemoteInterpolationPlayback`1.GetDiagnostics
member.summary: Captures the current interpolation playback health for diagnostics / smoke output.

member.name: M:AbilityKit.Network.Runtime.RemoteInterpolationPlayback`1.Reset
member.summary: Clears the buffer and resets the timeline and playback flags.

member.name: T:AbilityKit.Network.Runtime.RemoteSnapshotBuffer`1
member.summary:
Gameplay-agnostic ordered buffer of remote authoritative snapshots keyed by a monotonic timeline value (typically server ticks). Used by style controllers to retain a short history of remote state so the presentation layer can play back delayed, smoothly interpolated entity state instead of snapping to the latest push.
The buffer keeps samples sorted by ascending, drops out-of-order or duplicate samples, and trims old samples beyond a bounded capacity.

member.name: P:AbilityKit.Network.Runtime.RemoteSnapshotBuffer`1.NewestTimelineTicks
member.summary: The newest buffered timeline value, or null when the buffer is empty.

member.name: P:AbilityKit.Network.Runtime.RemoteSnapshotBuffer`1.OldestTimelineTicks
member.summary: The oldest buffered timeline value, or null when the buffer is empty.

member.name: M:AbilityKit.Network.Runtime.RemoteSnapshotBuffer`1.TryAdd(`0)
member.summary: Adds a snapshot to the buffer. Snapshots whose timeline value is older than or equal to the newest buffered sample are rejected as stale, keeping the buffer strictly increasing.
member.returns: true when the snapshot was accepted, false when it was stale/duplicate.

member.name: M:AbilityKit.Network.Runtime.RemoteSnapshotBuffer`1.TrySample(System.Int64,AbilityKit.Network.Runtime.RemoteSnapshotInterpolation{`0}@)
member.summary: Selects the two samples bracketing the requested timeline value and the interpolation factor between them. When the target falls before the oldest sample the result clamps to the oldest sample; when it falls after the newest sample the result reports extrapolation against the newest sample.

member.name: T:AbilityKit.Network.Runtime.IRemoteSnapshotSample
member.summary: Contract for a remote snapshot stored in a . The timeline value must be monotonically increasing across snapshots; server ticks are the canonical source in the Shooter sample.

member.name: T:AbilityKit.Network.Runtime.RemoteSnapshotInterpolation`1
member.summary: The result of sampling a at a target timeline value: the bracketing snapshots, the interpolation factor between them and, when the target is ahead of the newest sample, how far the playback would have to extrapolate.

member.name: P:AbilityKit.Network.Runtime.RemoteSnapshotInterpolation`1.From
member.summary: The earlier bracketing snapshot.

member.name: P:AbilityKit.Network.Runtime.RemoteSnapshotInterpolation`1.To
member.summary: The later bracketing snapshot. Equals when clamped/extrapolating.

member.name: P:AbilityKit.Network.Runtime.RemoteSnapshotInterpolation`1.Alpha
member.summary: Interpolation factor in [0,1] between and .

member.name: P:AbilityKit.Network.Runtime.RemoteSnapshotInterpolation`1.ExtrapolationTicks
member.summary: How far past the newest sample the target time fell, in timeline ticks. Zero when the target was inside the buffered range. Positive values indicate the playback is starved and holding on the newest sample (an extrapolation policy may choose to act on this).

member.name: P:AbilityKit.Network.Runtime.RemoteSnapshotInterpolation`1.IsInterpolating
member.summary: Whether the sample is a genuine interpolation between two distinct snapshots.

member.name: P:AbilityKit.Network.Runtime.RemoteSnapshotInterpolation`1.IsExtrapolating
member.summary: Whether the target time is ahead of the newest buffered snapshot.

member.name: T:AbilityKit.Network.Runtime.LagCompensation.ServerRewindLagCompensationConfig
member.summary: Configuration for server-side rewind lag compensation.

member.name: T:AbilityKit.Network.Runtime.LagCompensation.LagCompensatedEntitySnapshot
member.summary: Sphere hitbox snapshot for one server-authoritative entity at a captured frame.

member.name: T:AbilityKit.Network.Runtime.LagCompensation.LagCompensationQuery
member.summary: Input query for evaluating a client-reported hit against rewound server history.

member.name: T:AbilityKit.Network.Runtime.LagCompensation.LagCompensationHitResult
member.summary: Deterministic result of a server-side rewound hit evaluation.

member.name: T:AbilityKit.Network.Runtime.LagCompensation.ServerRewindLagCompensationService
member.summary: Framework-level server rewind helper for favor-the-shooter hit validation. Demos provide authoritative entity snapshots; this service owns history and deterministic ray-sphere evaluation.

member.name: T:AbilityKit.Network.Runtime.NetworkSyncModel
member.summary: Describes the network synchronization strategy used by a session or gameplay sample. This is intentionally gameplay-agnostic so samples can share the same sync vocabulary.

member.name: F:AbilityKit.Network.Runtime.NetworkSyncModel.Unspecified
member.summary: No explicit network synchronization model has been selected.

member.name: F:AbilityKit.Network.Runtime.NetworkSyncModel.Lockstep
member.summary: Deterministic input synchronization without client rollback recovery. Not implemented yet — reserved for a future lockstep sync strategy.

member.name: F:AbilityKit.Network.Runtime.NetworkSyncModel.PredictRollback
member.summary: Local prediction, authoritative snapshots, rollback, replay and reconciliation. Implemented (see the predict-rollback client sync strategy).

member.name: F:AbilityKit.Network.Runtime.NetworkSyncModel.AuthoritativeInterpolation
member.summary: Server authoritative entity state snapshots consumed through interpolation or extrapolation. Implemented (see the authoritative-interpolation client sync strategy).

member.name: F:AbilityKit.Network.Runtime.NetworkSyncModel.BatchStateSync
member.summary: Server authoritative state updates published in low-frequency batches. Not implemented yet — reserved for a future batched state-sync strategy.

member.name: F:AbilityKit.Network.Runtime.NetworkSyncModel.MassBattleLodSync
member.summary: Large-scale server authoritative synchronization with interest management and LOD policies. Not implemented yet — reserved for a future mass-battle LOD sync strategy.

member.name: F:AbilityKit.Network.Runtime.NetworkSyncModel.HybridHeroPrediction
member.summary: Mixed strategy, usually local hero prediction plus remote interpolation and batched ordinary units. Not implemented yet — reserved for a future hybrid hero-prediction strategy.

member.name: F:AbilityKit.Network.Runtime.NetworkSyncModel.FastReconnect
member.summary: Fast reconnect and state restoration flow built around targeted snapshots. Not implemented yet — reserved for a future fast-reconnect strategy.

member.name: F:AbilityKit.Network.Runtime.NetworkSyncModel.ServerRewindLagCompensation
member.summary: Server-side rewind of authoritative history for latency-compensated hit validation. Implemented by the server rewind lag compensation helper.

member.name: T:AbilityKit.Network.Runtime.Sync.FastReconnectPhase
member.summary: 当前所处的生命周期阶段。会话从 开始， 连接中断后进入 ，重连时根据客户端落后程度选择两条恢复路径之一： （小 gap，从缓冲增量追帧）或 （大 gap，需要新的权威快照）。 任一路径最终都会进入 。

member.name: T:AbilityKit.Network.Runtime.Sync.FastReconnectStepReport
member.summary: 单次 阶段迁移的结果：会话当前阶段、该迁移的玩法无关校正诊断， 以及迁移过程中发出的健康事件。Carrier 会把 与 直接转发到 单步遥测中，让 harness 使用与其他同步模型相同的管线聚合重连视图。

member.name: T:AbilityKit.Network.Runtime.Sync.FastReconnectSession
member.summary: 能力的玩法无关实现（审计迁移步骤 7）。 该会话是 档案背后的可复用运行时 （Recovery = | ）： 它跟踪最后确认的权威帧，并在重连时根据帧 gap 相对可配置恢复窗口的大小，在增量恢复与完整快照重建之间决策。 每次迁移都会暴露统一的 （、 、、 ）以及 ， 让示例完全通过框架驱动重连，而不是重新实现各自的恢复状态。

member.name: M:AbilityKit.Network.Runtime.Sync.FastReconnectSession.#ctor(System.Int32)
member.param: 可通过增量恢复处理的最大权威帧 gap。重连 gap 小于等于该窗口时从缓冲增量恢复；更大的 gap 会强制完整快照重建。

member.name: P:AbilityKit.Network.Runtime.Sync.FastReconnectSession.LastAckedServerFrame
member.summary: 客户端已完整确认的最新权威帧。

member.name: P:AbilityKit.Network.Runtime.Sync.FastReconnectSession.CurrentServerFrame
member.summary: 最近一次重连时观察到的权威帧（连接中为 0）。

member.name: P:AbilityKit.Network.Runtime.Sync.FastReconnectSession.PendingGapFrames
member.summary: 当前进行中的恢复正在闭合的帧 gap。仅当 为 或 时有效。

member.name: M:AbilityKit.Network.Runtime.Sync.FastReconnectSession.ObserveServerFrame(System.Int32)
member.summary: 在连接状态下记录一次常规权威心跳，并确认 。 发出信息级 事件。

member.name: M:AbilityKit.Network.Runtime.Sync.FastReconnectSession.Disconnect
member.summary: 标记连接已丢失。本地播放会保持饥饿状态，直到调用 。 在最后确认帧发出 警告。

member.name: M:AbilityKit.Network.Runtime.Sync.FastReconnectSession.Reconnect(System.Int32)
member.summary: 在 处重新建立连接并选择恢复路径。 始终发出携带 gap 的 警告；恢复窗口内的 gap 进入 ，否则请求完整快照（） 并进入 。调用 完成恢复。

member.name: M:AbilityKit.Network.Runtime.Sync.FastReconnectSession.CompleteRecovery
member.summary: 完成进行中的恢复：增量恢复会将客户端追到权威帧，完整快照路径会先应用快照 （）。两条路径都会以 结束，并让会话进入已闭合 gap 的 。

member.name: T:AbilityKit.Network.Runtime.Sync.IClientSyncStrategy`2
member.summary:
客户端同步模型的玩法无关契约（同步演示框架的“A 轴”）。一个策略封装一种让本地客户端与权威时间线保持一致的方式， 例如预测回滚，或纯远端 actor 权威插值，并且不依赖任何具体示例（Shooter、Moba 等）。
示例只需提供两个玩法特定类型，其余部分可原样复用策略： 是玩家逐 tick 产生的本地命令， 是策略播放的已解码远端快照样本。其他内容（tick 节奏、校正记账、恢复状态）都位于框架中， 因此一个同步模型只需实现一次，就可以在多个示例间共享。
member.typeparam: 每个 tick 提交的玩法特定本地输入命令。
从权威端观察到的已解码远端快照样本。

member.name: M:AbilityKit.Network.Runtime.Sync.IClientSyncStrategy`2.Tick(System.Single)
member.summary: 按给定帧间隔推进策略，并根据模型应用预测、重放和/或插值，返回本 tick 的模拟结果。
member.param: 距离上一个 tick 的经过时间，单位为秒。

member.name: M:AbilityKit.Network.Runtime.Sync.IClientSyncStrategy`2.SubmitInput(`0@)
member.summary: 记录本地玩家当前 tick 的输入。不消费本地输入的模型（例如纯权威插值）可以忽略它。

member.name: M:AbilityKit.Network.Runtime.Sync.IClientSyncStrategy`2.ObserveRemote(`1@)
member.summary: 将来自权威端的已解码远端快照样本送入策略，使其可以向权威状态校正、缓冲或插值。
member.param: 从权威端观察到的远端样本。

member.name: M:AbilityKit.Network.Runtime.Sync.IClientSyncStrategy`2.GetReconciliationReport
member.summary: 返回最近一次校正/恢复诊断；如果模型尚未校正，则返回 。

member.name: T:AbilityKit.Network.Runtime.Sync.NetworkSyncProfileControllerBuilder`2
member.summary: 根据调用方持有的上下文构建指定 profile 的同步控制器。

member.name: T:AbilityKit.Network.Runtime.Sync.NetworkSyncProfileControllerRegistry`2
member.summary:
面向示例与玩法客户端的可复用 profile 键控控制器注册表。
框架代码负责 profile 选择与注册机制；玩法示例只需提供自身的强类型上下文和控制器构建器， 从而让示例工厂保持轻量，同时继续兼容基于旧模型的 API。

member.name: T:AbilityKit.Network.Runtime.Sync.NetworkSyncProfileRegistry
member.summary: 审计迁移步骤 6“枚举收敛”决策的单一事实来源： 保留为向后兼容的别名 key， 实际能力描述位于 。该注册表是唯一知道所有已知模型、规范档案与稳定显示名的位置， 因此映射关系不再需要同时维护手写 switch 与静态属性集合。
member.remarks: 该注册表与玩法和协议无关：它只引用帧、tick、策略层概念。游戏层可以继续通过旧 API 传入 ；新逻辑应读取解析后的 策略字段，而不是对别名分支。

member.name: P:AbilityKit.Network.Runtime.Sync.NetworkSyncProfileRegistry.Count
member.summary: 已注册兼容模型数量。

member.name: M:AbilityKit.Network.Runtime.Sync.NetworkSyncProfileRegistry.Resolve(AbilityKit.Network.Runtime.NetworkSyncModel)
member.summary: 解析兼容模型对应的规范 。 对未知模型抛出 ，避免调用方静默使用空档案运行。

member.name: M:AbilityKit.Network.Runtime.Sync.NetworkSyncProfileRegistry.TryResolve(AbilityKit.Network.Runtime.NetworkSyncModel,AbilityKit.Network.Runtime.Sync.NetworkSyncProfile@)
member.summary: 尝试解析兼容模型对应的规范档案，不抛出异常。

member.name: M:AbilityKit.Network.Runtime.Sync.NetworkSyncProfileRegistry.GetName(AbilityKit.Network.Runtime.NetworkSyncModel)
member.summary: 返回兼容模型的稳定显示名（与枚举成员名一致）。对未知模型抛出 。

member.name: M:AbilityKit.Network.Runtime.Sync.NetworkSyncProfileRegistry.Models
member.summary: 按枚举顺序遍历所有已注册兼容模型。

member.name: M:AbilityKit.Network.Runtime.Sync.NetworkSyncProfileRegistry.Profiles
member.summary: 按枚举顺序遍历所有已注册档案。适合在不手写每个 profile 的情况下构建能力矩阵。

member.name: M:AbilityKit.Network.Runtime.Sync.NetworkSyncProfiles.FromCompatibilityModel(AbilityKit.Network.Runtime.NetworkSyncModel)
member.summary: 为旧兼容模型解析规范 profile。映射现在由 统一持有 （审计迁移步骤 6 的枚举收敛），因此 model→profile 关系只存在于一个位置，而不是在这里再复制一份 手写 switch。该方法作为既有调用点保留。

member.name: T:AbilityKit.Network.Runtime.Sync.ServerClockEstimator
member.summary:
协议无关的估算器，用于把 NTP 风格的时间同步往返样本转换为本地时钟与权威服务器时钟之间的 持续偏移估计，以及往返时间（RTT）。它刻意只接收原始 tick 值，从而与任何具体线协议类型 （例如网关时间同步响应）解耦：调用方传入 clientSendTicks、serverReceiveTicks 和 clientReceiveTicks，估算器会折叠每个样本。
与真实 NTP 客户端类似，RTT 最低（排队/抖动最少）的样本通常最准确，因此估算器保留目前观测到的 最低 RTT 样本对应偏移，而不是对噪声样本求平均。这样 在抖动下保持稳定， 同时在更好（更低 RTT）样本到来时仍能快速收敛。

member.name: M:AbilityKit.Network.Runtime.Sync.ServerClockEstimator.#ctor(System.Int64)
member.param: 一秒对应多少个服务器 tick。用于把 RTT/偏移转换为秒以便诊断。必须为正；非正值会按 1 处理，避免除零。

member.name: P:AbilityKit.Network.Runtime.Sync.ServerClockEstimator.ServerTickFrequency
member.summary: 一秒对应多少个服务器 tick。

member.name: P:AbilityKit.Network.Runtime.Sync.ServerClockEstimator.HasSample
member.summary: 是否已经观测到至少一个往返样本。

member.name: P:AbilityKit.Network.Runtime.Sync.ServerClockEstimator.SampleCount
member.summary: 目前已折叠的往返样本数量。

member.name: P:AbilityKit.Network.Runtime.Sync.ServerClockEstimator.BestRoundTripTicks
member.summary: 目前观测到的最佳（最低）往返时间，单位为 tick。首个样本到来前为零。

member.name: P:AbilityKit.Network.Runtime.Sync.ServerClockEstimator.BestRoundTripSeconds
member.summary: 目前观测到的最佳往返时间，单位为秒。

member.name: P:AbilityKit.Network.Runtime.Sync.ServerClockEstimator.OffsetTicks
member.summary: 需要加到本地时钟值上以获得服务器时间的估算偏移，单位为 tick。该值来自最低 RTT 样本对应偏移。 首个样本到来前为零。

member.name: P:AbilityKit.Network.Runtime.Sync.ServerClockEstimator.OffsetSeconds
member.summary: 估算时钟偏移，单位为秒。

member.name: M:AbilityKit.Network.Runtime.Sync.ServerClockEstimator.ObserveRoundTrip(System.Int64,System.Int64,System.Int64)
member.summary:
将一个往返时间同步样本折叠进估算。所有值都使用相同 tick 单位（）。 本地发送/接收时间戳来自同一个本地时钟；服务器时间戳来自服务器时钟。
RTT 为 clientReceive - clientSend。假设路径对称，服务器时间戳相当于在本地时间 clientSend + RTT/2 处采集，因此偏移为 serverReceive - (clientSend + RTT/2)。 只有当该样本 RTT 是目前最低值（或它是首个样本）时才会采纳，模拟 NTP 的最佳样本选择。
member.param: 请求发出时的本地时钟。
服务器标记响应时的服务器时钟。
收到响应时的本地时钟。
member.returns: 如果该样本成为新的最佳估算则为 true；否则为 false。

member.name: M:AbilityKit.Network.Runtime.Sync.ServerClockEstimator.ToServerTicks(System.Int64)
member.summary: 应用当前偏移，将本地时钟值转换为估算的权威服务器时钟值。没有样本前原样返回 。

member.name: M:AbilityKit.Network.Runtime.Sync.ServerClockEstimator.StampServerTicks(AbilityKit.Network.Runtime.Sync.SyncTimeAnchor,System.Int64)
member.summary: 使用 对应的估算服务器时钟标记 。 尚未观测到样本时原样返回 anchor，确保调用方不会发布伪造的服务器时间。

member.name: M:AbilityKit.Network.Runtime.Sync.ServerClockEstimator.Reset
member.summary: 清除所有已观测样本，将估算器恢复到初始状态。

member.name: T:AbilityKit.Network.Runtime.Sync.SyncClock
member.summary: 同步栈的单一时间源：推进本地帧时间线，并在 已观测到往返样本后， 为每个产出的 标记估算服务器时钟。它是时间锚点的唯一工厂， 让预测、插值、回溯与演示播放共享同一套时钟。

member.name: P:AbilityKit.Network.Runtime.Sync.SyncClock.ServerClock
member.summary: 可选的服务器时钟估算器。当它存在且已有样本时，时间锚点会携带估算的 。

member.name: P:AbilityKit.Network.Runtime.Sync.SyncClock.LocalFrame
member.summary: 下一次将发出的本地帧索引。

member.name: P:AbilityKit.Network.Runtime.Sync.SyncClock.DeltaSeconds
member.summary: 每次 调用推进的秒数。

member.name: M:AbilityKit.Network.Runtime.Sync.SyncClock.Advance
member.summary: 产出当前帧的时间锚点，然后推进本地帧计数器。

member.name: M:AbilityKit.Network.Runtime.Sync.SyncClock.AnchorFor(System.Int32)
member.summary: 为显式帧索引构建时间锚点，不推进内部状态。适用于拥有自身帧计数器的重放或确定性 harness 循环。

member.name: M:AbilityKit.Network.Runtime.Sync.SyncClock.Reset
member.summary: 将本地帧计数器重置为零。

member.name: T:AbilityKit.Network.Runtime.Sync.SyncHealthEvent
member.summary: 单次同步 tick 中发出的玩法无关同步健康信号。Carrier 会将它与 一起暴露， 让 DemoHarness 可以聚合统一的健康视图（快照流、插值、恢复、输入、验证），而不是继续扩展校正报告。 该事件刻意保持轻量：包含类别、严重级别、关联帧，以及一个含义由类别决定的数值负载 （例如重放 tick 数、丢弃快照数、重映射帧）。

member.name: M:AbilityKit.Network.Runtime.Sync.SyncHealthEvent.Info(AbilityKit.Network.Runtime.Sync.SyncHealthEventKind,System.Int32,System.Int64)
member.summary: 创建指定类别的 事件。

member.name: M:AbilityKit.Network.Runtime.Sync.SyncHealthEvent.Warning(AbilityKit.Network.Runtime.Sync.SyncHealthEventKind,System.Int32,System.Int64)
member.summary: 创建指定类别的 事件。

member.name: M:AbilityKit.Network.Runtime.Sync.SyncHealthEvent.Error(AbilityKit.Network.Runtime.Sync.SyncHealthEventKind,System.Int32,System.Int64)
member.summary: 创建指定类别的 事件。

member.name: T:AbilityKit.Network.Runtime.Sync.SyncHealthEventKind
member.summary: 客户端/服务器同步策略在单个 tick 中可发出的玩法无关同步健康事件分类。这是同步抽象审计（§6.5） 要求的统一诊断词汇： 保持聚焦预测/回滚校正，而更广泛的 生命周期信号（快照流、插值饥饿、恢复请求、输入接收、延迟补偿验证）会作为离散 上报，让 DemoHarness 无需膨胀校正报告即可聚合它们。

member.name: F:AbilityKit.Network.Runtime.Sync.SyncHealthEventKind.None
member.summary: 无事件；默认/空槽位。

member.name: T:AbilityKit.Network.Runtime.Sync.SyncHealthSeverity
member.summary: 的严重程度分层，让 harness 与 UI 无需在各处硬编码分类， 即可区分常规信号、降级和故障。

member.name: F:AbilityKit.Network.Runtime.Sync.SyncHealthSeverity.Info
member.summary: 常规、预期内信号（例如收到快照、输入被接收）。

member.name: F:AbilityKit.Network.Runtime.Sync.SyncHealthSeverity.Warning
member.summary: 可恢复降级（例如插值饥饿、快照丢弃）。

member.name: F:AbilityKit.Network.Runtime.Sync.SyncHealthSeverity.Error
member.summary: 需要校正/恢复的故障（例如快照 gap、输入被拒绝）。

member.name: T:AbilityKit.Network.Runtime.Sync.SyncReconciliationReason
member.summary: 客户端同步策略判定本地状态已偏离权威服务器状态并需要校正的玩法无关原因。 它统一了各个示例过去通过自定义枚举表达的含义（例如 Shooter 的 ShooterClientResyncReason）， 让演示框架可以跨所有 统一报告校正。

member.name: F:AbilityKit.Network.Runtime.Sync.SyncReconciliationReason.None
member.summary: 不需要校正；本地状态与服务器保持同步。

member.name: F:AbilityKit.Network.Runtime.Sync.SyncReconciliationReason.ImportFailed
member.summary: 导入/应用权威快照失败。

member.name: F:AbilityKit.Network.Runtime.Sync.SyncReconciliationReason.AuthoritativeHashMismatch
member.summary: 权威状态哈希与本地预测哈希不一致。

member.name: F:AbilityKit.Network.Runtime.Sync.SyncReconciliationReason.ClientHashRejected
member.summary: 服务器拒绝了客户端上报的状态哈希。

member.name: F:AbilityKit.Network.Runtime.Sync.SyncReconciliationReason.FrameTooFarBehind
member.summary: 本地模拟落后权威帧过多，无法增量追赶。

member.name: F:AbilityKit.Network.Runtime.Sync.SyncReconciliationReason.FrameTooFarAhead
member.summary: 本地模拟超前权威帧过多。

member.name: F:AbilityKit.Network.Runtime.Sync.SyncReconciliationReason.SnapshotTimeout
member.summary: 预期的权威快照未在允许窗口内到达。

member.name: F:AbilityKit.Network.Runtime.Sync.SyncReconciliationReason.WorldMismatch
member.summary: 权威更新指向了与本地不同的世界/会话。

member.name: T:AbilityKit.Network.Runtime.Sync.SyncReconciliationReport
member.summary:
客户端同步策略产出的玩法无关校正/追赶诊断。 它替代示例过去暴露的零散 Last* 字段（例如 Shooter 的 LastResyncReason / LastResyncClientFrame / LastResyncAuthoritativeStateHash ...），为演示框架提供单一统一方式， 跨所有同步模型展示“客户端为何分歧，以及如何恢复”。
从不进行校正的模型（例如远端 actor 的纯权威插值）只需报告 。

member.name: F:AbilityKit.Network.Runtime.Sync.SyncReconciliationReport.None
member.summary: 表示未发生校正的空报告。

member.name: P:AbilityKit.Network.Runtime.Sync.SyncReconciliationReport.Reason
member.summary: 最近一次校正被触发的原因（或 ）。

member.name: P:AbilityKit.Network.Runtime.Sync.SyncReconciliationReport.RecoveryState
member.summary: 策略当前所处的恢复阶段。

member.name: P:AbilityKit.Network.Runtime.Sync.SyncReconciliationReport.NeedsFullSnapshot
member.summary: 策略是否正在等待完整权威快照以恢复。

member.name: P:AbilityKit.Network.Runtime.Sync.SyncReconciliationReport.ClientFrame
member.summary: 检测到分歧时的本地模拟帧。

member.name: P:AbilityKit.Network.Runtime.Sync.SyncReconciliationReport.AuthoritativeFrame
member.summary: 分歧涉及的权威服务器帧。

member.name: P:AbilityKit.Network.Runtime.Sync.SyncReconciliationReport.ClientStateHash
member.summary: 分歧点处的本地预测状态哈希。

member.name: P:AbilityKit.Network.Runtime.Sync.SyncReconciliationReport.AuthoritativeStateHash
member.summary: 分歧点处的权威状态哈希。

member.name: P:AbilityKit.Network.Runtime.Sync.SyncReconciliationReport.ReplayTicks
member.summary: 最近一次回滚/校正期间重放的 tick 数（没有时为 0）。

member.name: P:AbilityKit.Network.Runtime.Sync.SyncReconciliationReport.DidReconcile
member.summary: 最近一次校正确实修复了本地状态时为 true。

member.name: T:AbilityKit.Network.Runtime.Sync.SyncRecoveryState
member.summary: 客户端同步策略当前所处的玩法无关恢复阶段。统一了示例过去通过自定义枚举表达的状态 （例如 Shooter 的 ShooterClientRecoveryState）。

member.name: F:AbilityKit.Network.Runtime.Sync.SyncRecoveryState.Normal
member.summary: 本地模拟/播放正常跟随服务器。

member.name: F:AbilityKit.Network.Runtime.Sync.SyncRecoveryState.CatchUp
member.summary: 通过快进本地模拟追赶较小的帧差。

member.name: F:AbilityKit.Network.Runtime.Sync.SyncRecoveryState.AwaitingFullSnapshot
member.summary: 漂移超过增量恢复能力；正在等待完整权威快照。

member.name: F:AbilityKit.Network.Runtime.Sync.SyncRecoveryState.ApplyingFullSnapshot
member.summary: 正在应用已收到的完整权威快照。

member.name: F:AbilityKit.Network.Runtime.Sync.SyncRecoveryState.Recovered
member.summary: 恢复刚刚完成，本地状态已还原到权威状态。

member.name: T:AbilityKit.Network.Runtime.Sync.SyncTickResult
member.summary: 客户端同步策略推进一次 update 后的玩法无关结果。 记录本地模拟/播放推进了多远，供演示框架驱动表现，并比较不同同步模型与网络 profile 下的行为。

member.name: F:AbilityKit.Network.Runtime.Sync.SyncTickResult.NotStarted
member.summary: 表示策略未推进的结果（例如尚未启动）。

member.name: P:AbilityKit.Network.Runtime.Sync.SyncTickResult.Ticks
member.summary: 本次 update 中推进的固定模拟/播放 tick 数。

member.name: P:AbilityKit.Network.Runtime.Sync.SyncTickResult.Frame
member.summary: 策略将本地模拟或播放推进到的帧。

member.name: P:AbilityKit.Network.Runtime.Sync.SyncTickResult.StateHash
member.summary: 本次 update 后本地模拟的状态哈希（不适用时为 0）。

member.name: T:AbilityKit.Network.Runtime.Sync.SyncTimeAnchor
member.summary: 捕获预测、插值、回溯和演示播放共用的时间坐标。

member.name: T:AbilityKit.Network.Runtime.Sync.TimeSyncBridge
member.summary:
时间同步交换与同步时钟之间的协议无关接缝。它持有一个 ， 将每次请求/响应往返折叠进去，并提供接入该估算器的 ，让产出的 anchor 在样本充分 收敛后携带估算服务器时钟。
该 bridge 只接收原始 tick 值；具体线协议消息（例如房间网关时间同步响应）的映射发生在 协议边界，因此本包永远不依赖任何协议包。调用方负责确保三个 tick 时间戳都使用 确立的同一 tick 单位。

member.name: P:AbilityKit.Network.Runtime.Sync.TimeSyncBridge.TickFrequency
member.summary: 客户端与服务器时间戳共享的 tick 单位。

member.name: P:AbilityKit.Network.Runtime.Sync.TimeSyncBridge.HasConverged
member.summary: 至少一个往返样本已折叠后为 true。

member.name: P:AbilityKit.Network.Runtime.Sync.TimeSyncBridge.SampleCount
member.summary: 目前已观测到的往返样本数量。

member.name: P:AbilityKit.Network.Runtime.Sync.TimeSyncBridge.BestRoundTripSeconds
member.summary: 目前观测到的最佳（最低）往返延迟，单位为秒。

member.name: P:AbilityKit.Network.Runtime.Sync.TimeSyncBridge.OffsetSeconds
member.summary: 当前最佳估算的客户端到服务器时钟偏移，单位为秒。

member.name: P:AbilityKit.Network.Runtime.Sync.TimeSyncBridge.Estimator
member.summary: 底层估算器，暴露给诊断与时钟接线使用。

member.name: M:AbilityKit.Network.Runtime.Sync.TimeSyncBridge.ObserveResponse(System.Int64,System.Int64,System.Int64)
member.summary: 将一次时间同步交换折叠进估算器。三个时间戳对应典型请求/响应流程：客户端在 发送，服务器以 上报自身时钟， 客户端在 收到响应。
member.returns: 当该样本改善了最佳往返估算时为 true。

member.name: M:AbilityKit.Network.Runtime.Sync.TimeSyncBridge.CreateClock(System.Double,System.Int64)
member.summary: 产出接入该 bridge 估算器的 。当 为 true 后， 它发出的 anchor 会携带估算服务器时钟。
